---
title: "Online text of The Trial: More Links of The Daisy Chain (1864) by Charlotte Mary Yonge"
sort_title: "Online text of The Trial: More Links of The Daisy Chain (1864) by Charlotte Mary Yonge"
year: 1864
gutenberg_url: "https://www.gutenberg.org/ebooks/3744"
slug: "trial"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


*1864*


[Read free online at Project Gutenberg](https://www.gutenberg.org/ebooks/3744)

---


###   
**Online text of**The Trial****

[Click here to reach the latest version of*The Trial*from Gutenberg](https://www.gutenberg.org/ebooks/3744)  
(Many thanks to Sandra Laythorpe and others)

#### Modern printed texts ofThe Trialhave also appeared recently

Search the internet for new and used copies

#### On the Trail ofThe Trial

#### An account of an expedition to the Isle of Wight by a Fellowship team

#### by Stephen Shell

#### [Click here to read this article](review/on%20the%20trail%20of%20the%20trial.qmd)

#### Published inThe Review of the Charlotte Mary Yonge Fellowship  
Edition Number 6 – Winter 1997 / 1998
